text: now to set the class values we use class list for every object we can check the class list it may be a single class in an object it may be multiple classes in an object so to check the classes of all objects we write object.classlist so we will get a list let's suppose we want to check the classes of our image so for that we can write let image is equal to document.queryselector and here we can pass our image so image.classlist will come to us so what we get? we get the class list value for image we have empty value length is equal to 0 value null basically it means that we have not given any class to the image yet but here in index.html we can give class to our image this is my image, we have given id to it we can give it many classes if we want let's suppose we give it class abc and another class xyz let's save and refresh again our image and class list for image this time we have two classes for image first class is abc and second class is xyz similarly we can print the class of our heading for this heading element we can make an object let heading is equal to here we have heading and now if we want to check the classes of heading so for that we can write heading.classlist so now heading doesn't have any individual classes so this class list will tell us how many classes does any element or object has but if we want we can manipulate those classes so in our class list if we want to add new classes so for that we can use add method let's suppose here we can write heading.classlist.add and we have added any class abc in it so now if we check our class list we will get abc in it and here our list length will be 21 till now there is no use of adding this abc class but let's suppose we want to change the color of this heading so whatever changes we want to make in styling we can make a class of all those changes so in our style.css we can make a class of color or a class of green and if there is a class of green with any element so its color will be set to the color green let's save and refresh it now we will access our heading again and for heading let's check our class list it is empty now so for heading in class list we can add our green class so we will add green as soon as green is added in our heading class list meaning heading got green class similarly styling will also be applied meaning its color will be green now if we check the heading class list so we will get this green and not only green if we want we can add more styling like if we want we can do text decoration for this set to wavy save and refresh it now what is heading is completely empty as soon as we give green class to any element its color will be green and its wavy underline will be there so what we can do is we can access heading and for heading we can add our class green so here we have class green we have to give it with wavy so let's underline here black wavy save refresh again our heading we gave green to heading so what happened color also changed along with that it has wavy underline similarly if we want we can make more changes like along with that we can make it italic or we can make some other changes so basically if we have to make many changes so we can write all these changes in our class and then we can add that class in our class list if we want to keep its underline in any other class so we can do that like let's suppose we made a class underline and in text decoration we have underlined black wavy or we can write it as purple wavy save refresh so now we can access our heading we can give heading .classlist.add for this we will add our class as green so if we add green then color will be green and again this time we will add class underline so what happened underline also came so all the styling we have we can add it in the form of classes now let's suppose if we don't want its color green we want to reset it so for that we can use our method classlist.remove which is useful to remove any of our class so if we want to remove color then we can do heading.classlist.remove we can pass our class green in remove so what happened our color got reset but the value in second classlist that is our underline that is still intact if we remove let's suppose green now we will enter so in that case no changes will come because that class is already removed so there is no sense to remove it again and again now this styling if we want we can set it with set attribute that is for our heading we can do heading.setattribute and in set attribute we can set our class value to the class name green enter so what happened our class name became green but as soon as this class name became green one thing we noticed that our underline got removed set attribute for this reason we don't use it for styling because in set attribute in one time we can have only one class value so either we can keep green class value or we can keep underline class value if we want to create multiple classes for styling and assign them so for that we will always use classlist for styling because in set attribute all the values of old class whether it was one value or five values all those will get reset to a single class value that is why set attribute is not preferred much we always prefer classlist property to set our value now along with this in classlist we have one more method which is the contains method contains method tells us that for any object in classlist any class exists or not like now we have set attribute for heading which is green so if we want for heading we can print its classlist so now only value is green so if we want to check whether heading has underline class or not so for that we can write classlist.contains and in contains we can pass underline if we enter so now what came false so now underline class does not exist in heading but if we pass green so for that we get true and apart from this we have one more method toggle method toggle method is used to add and remove classes toggle means basically a switch like we have switch to turn on fan in house switch to turn on light how does switch work in switch if switch is on and you will press it so what will happen switch will be off and if switch is already off and we will press it so what will happen switch will be on means if it is on we will not press again always off if it is off always press that is on so in the same way we call it toggling or we call it toggle if something is yes then if we perform toggle operation on it so that will be no and something is now no so if we toggle so that will be yes and if we toggle again so that will be and if we do it again, it will be yes again so when a state is between 0 and 1 we call it toggling to toggle between add and remove we use toggle method basic function of toggle method is it checks if class already exists if it exists, it will remove it if it doesn't exist, it will add it if it exists again, it will remove it if it doesn't exist, it will add it like here our heading class list it has only green class so for heading we will toggle our green class enter this .classlist.toggle we have to do so what happened? we got false false means that green is removed so green already existed in class list so what did toggle do? it removed it and now if we check class list we got none similarly, like green we can write underline in toggle enter and true meaning heading.classlist.toggle saw that underline was not there so it added it and returned true so here we have underline similarly, we can see toggle of green so what did toggle do? it checked if exists or not and remove it it will remove and return false and this time if we check class list we will get only green not underline so toggle works like if class exists remove it and if it doesn't so we can make a class yellowbg and in this class we can set our background color to yellow save and refresh now here we will make a variable box document.query selector and select it with the class .classlist.add yellow background color enter so even now the background color of the box hasn't changed even though the class is added in the box box is also added and so is the background color this
